features.title: How It Works
features.subtitle: Create an AI Music Video in 4 Simple Steps
features.description: Our AI music video generator handles the entire music to video process. Upload your track, describe your vision, and get a finished AI music video — no editing skills required.

item-1.title: Upload Your Music Track
item-1.description: Start by uploading any audio file to the AI music video generator. We support MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, and OGG formats. Our AI analyzes every detail — beat, tempo, mood, energy, and song structure — to build the perfect visual foundation for your music video. This deep audio analysis is what makes our AI music video maker different from simple slideshow tools.

item-2.title: Describe Your Creative Vision
item-2.description: Tell our AI music video generator exactly what you envision. Choose from cinematic, anime, abstract, realistic, or other visual styles. Describe specific scenes, set a mood, pick color palettes. Whether you want a narrative storytelling music video or pure visual art synced to the beat, the AI understands your creative direction and translates it into a detailed visual plan.

item-3.title: AI Generates Your Music Video
item-3.description: Our AI music video maker orchestrates the entire creation pipeline automatically: storyboard generation, scene composition, shot-by-shot visual creation, beat-synced editing, transitions timed to drops and accents, and final composition. The AI agent coordinates multiple specialized models to produce a cohesive, professional AI music video that feels hand-crafted.

item-4.title: Download and Share Everywhere
item-4.description: Your AI music video is ready to download in minutes. Export in HD or 4K quality, optimized for YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, or any platform. Our music video maker gives you a professional result that you can share instantly — from your first upload to a published music video in under 10 minutes.

features3.title: Features

features3.description: A complete AI music video maker packed with powerful features to turn any track into a stunning music video.

item-1.title: Intelligent Audio Analysis
item-1.description: Our AI music video generator performs deep audio analysis — detecting tempo, key, energy curves, and song structure. Every section of your track (intro, verse, chorus, bridge, drop) is identified and mapped to create perfectly timed visual transitions in your music video.

item-2.title: AI-Powered Storyboard Creation
item-2.description: The AI music video maker automatically generates a visual storyboard from your music. Each scene is planned to match the narrative arc and emotional flow, turning music to video with cinematic storytelling that goes far beyond random visual generation.

item-3.title: Diverse Visual Styles
item-3.description: Choose from dozens of AI music video styles — cinematic live-action, anime, 3D abstract, watercolor, pixel art, retro, and more. Each style in our music video maker is crafted to complement different music genres, from hip-hop to classical.

item-4.title: Beat-Perfect Transitions
item-4.description: Every cut, transition, and visual effect in your AI music video is synchronized to the beat. Our music to video technology ensures visuals hit every drop, accent, and rhythmic change — creating that professional music video feel automatically.

item-5.title: Multi-Format Export
item-5.description: Export your AI music video in any format — HD 1080p, 4K, vertical for Instagram Reels and TikTok, widescreen for YouTube. Our AI music video generator optimizes output for every platform so your music video looks perfect everywhere.

item-6.description: Share your finished AI music video directly to social platforms. From idea to published music video in minutes — our AI music video maker makes distribution as easy as creation.

faqs.title: FAQ
faqs.subtitle: Frequently Asked Questions About Our AI Music Video Generator

items.question: What is an AI music video generator?
items.answer: An AI music video generator is a tool that uses artificial intelligence to automatically create music videos from your audio tracks. yino.ai's AI music video generator analyzes your music's beat, tempo, mood, and structure, then generates perfectly synced visuals, transitions, and effects — turning music to video without any manual editing or video production skills.

items.question: How does the AI music video maker work?
items.answer: Our AI music video maker works in 4 simple steps: (1) Upload your music track in any format, (2) Describe your creative vision — style, mood, scenes, (3) Our AI agent generates the storyboard, creates visuals, and composes the final video, (4) Download your finished AI music video. The entire process is automated and takes just minutes.

items.question: What audio formats does the AI music video generator support?
items.answer: Our AI music video generator supports all major audio formats including MP3, WAV, FLAC, AAC, and OGG. Upload your music track in any of these formats and the AI will analyze it to create your music video. No format conversion needed — just upload and let the AI music video maker do the rest.

items.question: How long does it take to create an AI music video?
items.answer: Most AI music videos are generated in 3–8 minutes, depending on the length of your track and the complexity of the visual style you choose. Our music to video pipeline is optimized for speed without sacrificing quality. A typical 3-minute song produces a finished music video in under 5 minutes.

items.question: Can I use the AI music video generator for free?
items.answer: Yes! yino.ai offers a free plan that lets you create AI music videos at 720p quality. This is perfect for trying out the AI music video generator and seeing how it transforms your music to video. For higher resolution, longer videos, and advanced features, check out our Creator and Pro plans.

items.question: What visual styles are available in the AI music video maker?
items.answer: Our AI music video maker offers dozens of visual styles including cinematic live-action, anime, 3D abstract, watercolor, pixel art, retro/vintage, neon, minimalist, and more. Each style is optimized for different music genres — choose cinematic for ballads, abstract for electronic, anime for pop. You can also describe a custom style and the AI music video generator will create it.

items.question: Can I customize the AI music video after generation?
items.answer: Yes, you can regenerate specific sections, change the visual style, adjust the mood, or modify scene descriptions and regenerate. Our AI music video generator gives you creative control while handling all the technical work of music to video production. Each iteration takes just minutes.

items.question: Do I own the rights to AI music videos I create?
items.answer: Yes, you retain full rights to all AI music videos created with yino.ai. You can use them for commercial purposes, upload to streaming platforms, monetize on YouTube, or share across social media. The music video you create with our AI music video maker is yours to use however you want.

items.question: How is the AI music video generator different from a slideshow maker?
items.answer: Unlike basic slideshow makers that overlay random images on audio, our AI music video generator performs deep audio analysis to understand your music's structure, beat, and emotional arc. It creates original visuals specifically designed for your track, with transitions synced to the beat and scene changes matched to song sections. The result is a true music video, not a slideshow.

items.question: What platforms can I share my AI music video on?
items.answer: You can share AI music videos created with our music video maker on any platform — YouTube, Instagram Reels, TikTok, Facebook, Twitter/X, Spotify Canvas, and more. Our AI music video generator lets you export in multiple formats and aspect ratios optimized for each platform, so your music video looks perfect everywhere.
